summary_from_search: NVDA controls ~80% AI accelerator market. AMD Instinct MI450 series (CDNA5, 2nm TSMC) in pipeline but lacks CUDA moat. Intel YTD +154% on data center demand but seen as speculative move. Blackwell Ultra described as '2 generations ahead.' Oppenheimer gives only Perform to AMD/Intel. Biggest emerging threat may not be AMD/Intel — possible hyperscaler custom silicon reference.
